title: Missing CORS headers on error responses
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE name = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Missing CORS headers on error status codes
